data.title: Princess Cruises offers special deals on 2026 cruises to Alaska, Hawaii, and Canada/New England to celebrate America's 250th anniversary.
data.description: Set sail on an unforgettable journey from coast to coast with the launch of the "Princess Signature Sale." Offering special deals on cruises to Alaska, Hawaii, and Canada & New England in 2026, this celebration comes just in time for the United States' 250th anniversary. The sale, starting in Fort Lauderdale, Florida on February 17th, 2026, promises exciting adventures and unique experiences for guests looking to explore the beauty of the country by sea. Don't miss out on this opportunity to be a part of history with Princess Cruises.

data.title: Infleqtion debuts strong after SPAC merger, bucking poor quantum computing stock trend in 2026. Investor's Business Daily reports.
data.description: Following a slump in quantum computing stocks in 2026, Infleqtion commences trading as a public entity today following a SPAC merger. The company debuted strongly, experiencing a significant rise in its stock value on the first day of trading.

data.title: Mining stocks face high expectations for earnings despite sinking metal prices. Wall Street anticipates major growth.
data.description: Mining stocks experienced a decline on Tuesday as investors brace for an upcoming earnings season with expectations of significant growth, even as the prices of metals like gold and silver dropped. This trend signals the anticipation of a challenging period for the mining sector.

data.title: Fluor's revenue fell 2% to $4.175B, missing views, but gained $1.35B from a sale, earnings per share fell 31%.
data.description: Fluor, headquartered in Irving, Texas, experienced a 2% decrease in revenue, amounting to $4.175 billion. Earnings per share also saw a decline of 31%, falling short of expectations. Despite this, the company managed to generate $1.35 billion from a particular sale, providing a boost in its financial performance.

data.title: NRG Energy stock sees price performance gains, leading to upgrade in IBD Relative Strength Rating.
data.description: NRG Energy is experiencing a notable increase in price performance, leading to an upgrade in its IBD Relative Strength Rating. The stock has displayed strong growth, prompting positive attention from investors. This development signifies the company's improving financial health and competitive standing within the market.

data.title: Old Dominion Freight Line stock gets RS Rating upgrade, indicating improving technical performance.
data.description: Old Dominion Freight Line experienced an upgrade in its Relative Strength Rating, indicating a boost in technical performance. This improvement has caused the RS Rating for the company to rise significantly.

data.title: Gemini stock plummets as Winklevoss-led crypto exchange lets go of three executives amid layoffs.
data.description: The stock of the crypto exchange Gemini, which is publicly traded, is experiencing a sharp drop after the company announced the departure of three executives as part of significant layoffs.

data.title: CFTC chair reaffirms support for prediction markets, filing amicus brief against state lawsuits.
data.description: Michael Selig revealed that the US financial regulator has taken action by filing an amicus brief to address the significant rise in state-led lawsuits targeting prediction markets. He emphasized the need to counter this trend, which has seen a surge in litigation cases.

data.title: Willow Lane Acquisition Corp. II closes $143.75M IPO of 14,375,000 units at $10/unit, including 1,875,000 overallotment.
data.description: On February 17, 2026, Willow Lane Acquisition Corp. II successfully completed its initial public offering by selling 14,375,000 units at $10.00 per unit. This includes an additional 1,875,000 units exercised by underwriters as part of the overallotment option.

data.title: Boca Woods Director Jeff Gullett is among 479 PGA Master Professionals. Highest designation achieved. BOCA RATON, Fla., Feb. 17, 2026.
data.description: In Boca Raton, Florida, Jeff Gullett, a PGA of America Golf Professional and Chief of Athletics at Boca Woods Country Club, has achieved the prestigious title of PGA Master Professional. This designation represents the highest level of education within the Association and showcases Gullett's expertise and commitment to the sport. The achievement was announced on February 17, 2026, highlighting Gullett's dedication to furthering his career in golf.

data.title: Greenwich House Music School selects six NYC performers for 2026 residency program. Record-breaking number of applications.
data.description: Today, Greenwich House Music School revealed the six NYC performers chosen for the 2026 Elebash Uncharted Artist-in-Residence program. This year saw a record number of applications.

IRAN BRIEFLY CLOSED THE STRAIT OF HORMUZ FOR SEVERAL HOURS ON TUESDAY AMID SECURITY DRILLS, ACCORDING TO IRANIAN MEDIA.
Fed's Barr: A low-hire, low-fire job market is not very dynamic, vulnerable to shocks.

data.title: FOX Nation subscription streaming service available on Prime Video in the US starting Feb. 17, 2026, expanding access.
data.description: FOX Nation, the subscription streaming service of FOX News Media, has officially debuted on Prime Video in the United States starting today, February 17, 2026. This move marks an expansion in availability, allowing viewers to access the full slate of programming from FOX Nation on Prime Video. By making this service available on Prime Video, FOX Nation is aiming to reach a wider audience in the U.S. This development is significant as it brings content from FOX Nation to a new platform, ultimately enhancing the viewing experience for subscribers.

data.title: Kung Fu Tea partners with ADVANCED® to launch HYDRATION+ Immunity* during Lunar New Year with iconic tea flavors.
data.description: In New York on February 17, 2026, Kung Fu Tea, a prominent bubble tea brand in America, revealed a significant collaboration with supplement company ADVANCED® to introduce HYDRATION+ Immunity*. This new line of functional* beverages, launched during the Lunar New Year, combines renowned tea flavors with extra benefits.

data.title: NAESCO to host 2026 Federal Market Workshop on March 19 in Washington, D.C. to discuss infrastructure modernization.
data.description: In Washington, the National Association of Energy Service Companies (NAESCO) is set to host the 2026 Federal Market Workshop on March 19, 2026, at the National Housing Center (NAHB). This event will convene federal agency officials, Energy Service Companies (ESCOs), and industry partners to address the enhancement of federal energy and building infrastructure. Emphasis will be placed on exploring contracting mechanisms that facilitate dependable project execution. This one-day workshop aims to facilitate discussions surrounding the modernization of federal energy infrastructure.

data.title: Inventor from Houston creates DIPE WIPE, a two-in-one diapering product for convenience.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on February 17, 2026, an inventor from Houston, Texas, shared the inspiration behind their creation of the DIPE WIPE. The inventor mentioned that the aim was to consolidate all the essentials required for changing a baby's diaper into a single product. This innovative product design aims to alleviate the necessity of carrying multiple items for diaper changing. The DIPE WIPE has garnered attention for streamlining this process and providing convenience.

data.title: Rev. Jesse Jackson has passed away in Chicago. He was among the first Black clergy to publicly get tested for HIV.
data.description: A prominent civil rights leader, Reverend Jesse Jackson, has passed away in Chicago at the age of [insert age] after battling a long illness, as confirmed by the AIDS Healthcare Foundation. Reverend Jackson, who was among the first Black clergy to publicly undergo HIV testing, played a vital role in combating the stigma associated with the disease within the African American community. Additionally, he was at the forefront of encouraging other clergy members to actively engage in addressing HIV issues both domestically and globally. Reverend Jackson's legacy extends beyond this, having formed close relationships with various leaders and being recognized for his immense contributions in the civil rights movement.

data.title: Euro-Wall introduces Horizon Multi Slide™ for coastal use, prioritizing performance, design, and serviceability.
data.description: Euro-Wall introduced the Horizon Multi Slide™ in North Port, Florida on February 17, 2026. This sliding door system was designed to meet the tough requirements of coastal environments. The product aims to blend performance, design, and serviceability based on input from installers, builders, and architects.
